reviews.review_description:
Cube PoP is the perfect blend of cozy and addictive! The concept is simple—shoot cubes matching their numbers—but the execution is polished and satisfying. The early levels are relaxing, but the escalating speed keeps things exciting. The art style is clean, the controls are responsive, and the risk-reward tension (don’t let cubes cross the red line!) makes every round engaging.
As an early access title, there’s room for more content (maybe power-ups or different modes?), but the core gameplay is already a blast. Ideal for quick, fun sessions when you want to unwind without sacrificing challenge. Highly recommend for arcade fans!

The concept of the game is simple - similar to some mobile games - but the concept is well done and addictive. You have to shoot at boxes which are showing the number how many hits you need for a box. If the box crosses a certain line you loose the game. Nice casual fun on the quest, perhaps also recommended for people who have to work on their aiming skills for other FPS.

This review is based on it being early access and still at concept.  It is a bright colourful crisp game where you Shoot boxes as they come towards you.  Each box has a number indicating the amount of times you have to hit it.  The game play is a bit too simple at the moment, I felt I would never end the level.  So the game needs more speed and level ramp up, or perhaps not only hitting the required box the correct amount of times but perhaps you have to switch between coloured ammo to match the colour of the box. it could benefit from a bit more variety in modes or environments to keep things fresh over longer play sessions. A progression system or unlockables would also add an extra layer of motivation.
It is work in progress and I can see where the dev wants to take it, the price point for the early access allows me to give it 4 stars.

The concept is good idea, I would say we need a few more game styles, time attack, limited ammo, maybe different colours to shoot.maybe some ducks to shoot.
There is definitely potential for a great game, it just needs a little more.I will update my review as more is added.

Starts easy but becomes more challenging as higher numbered boxes start approaching. 

Would be great to see a variety of guns to choose from in a future update:)

Definitely has potential and looking forward to where the dev takes it!
